   "reasoning": "I'm sick of people talking about 'supporting students' without actually putting money in our pockets. Scholarships are the only thing that's going to keep me and my friends in school, so that should be the top priority. Attendance mandates are just a joke - how are we supposed to come to school when we're working to feed our families? Give us the financial help we need, not more empty promises.",
